title: Ghosts Experience
description: A vanilla+ pack adding a ton of new features/dungeons to undertake
body:
A vanilla+ Pack that overhauls the majority of minecraft primarily utilizing Datapacks and QoL mods to keep the vanilla feel. This pack also poses a challenge as many of the enemies in the game are heavily buffed making this a pack for those who want a more immersive but also challenging experience.

(Will write more in the future)
